test_strategy_covers_unit.evidence: 60 unit tests across persona-loader.test.cjs (28), config-reader.test.cjs (20), persona-schema-validation.test.cjs (12)

test_strategy_covers_integration.evidence: 24 integration tests across persona-config-integration.test.cjs (10), persona-override-integration.test.cjs (8), roundtable-context-integration.test.cjs (6)

test_strategy_covers_security.evidence: Security tests: TC-M1-27 (path traversal), TC-M1-14 (YAML injection), TC-M1-28 (file permission). Documented in test-strategy.md Section 6.

test_strategy_covers_performance.evidence: NFR-001 performance tests: TC-NFR-01 (10 file loading < 500ms), TC-E2E-06 (hook timing). Documented in test-strategy.md Section 5.

test_cases_exist_for_all_requirements.evidence: All 11 FRs (FR-001 through FR-011) and 5 NFRs have test cases. 65/65 ACs traced.

traceability_matrix_complete.evidence: test-traceability-matrix.csv: 148 rows covering all 65 ACs + 5 NFRs. 100% requirement coverage.

coverage_targets_defined.evidence: M1: >=85% line, >=80% branch. M2: >=85% line, >=80% branch. Overall: >=80% line, >=70% branch (per Article II).

test_data_strategy_documented.evidence: test-data-plan.md covers boundary values, invalid inputs, maximum-size inputs, generation strategy, cleanup strategy.

critical_paths_identified.evidence: P0 critical paths: persona discovery + override-by-copy (M1), config defaults backward compat (M2). Documented in test-strategy.md Section 10.

Article II (Test-First).evidence: 94 automated test cases designed before implementation. Coverage targets >= 80% line defined. Test pyramid documented.

Article VII (Traceability).evidence: Traceability matrix maps all 65 ACs + 5 NFRs to test cases. 100% requirement coverage. No orphan tests.

Article IX (Quality Gates).evidence: GATE-04 checklist fully satisfied. All 4 required artifacts produced: test-strategy.md, test-cases.md, test-traceability-matrix.csv, test-data-plan.md.

Article XI (Integration Testing).evidence: 24 integration tests validate real module interactions with real filesystem. Temp directory isolation, no mocked external services.
